title: Thursday
content:
So well the week has sped, hast thou a friend,
    Go spend an hour in converse.    It will lend
    New beauty to thy labours and thy life
    To pause a little sometimes in the strife.
        Toil soon seems rude
         That has no interlude.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Ella Wheeler Wilcox, titled "Thursday", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
